title: Baubles 2
description: Adding a new touch of bling to Minecraft.
body:
Baubles 2 is an accessories and trinkets library that adds expanded inventory slots, and a complete rewrite of the original [Baubles by Azanor13](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles) for modern Minecraft.

This library provides 7 new equipment slots in a new Baubles Inventory, accessible through the 'B' key by default, and the Ring button within the vanilla survival inventory.

![The Baubles Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb3a6f48e81c47fb051fbc7b77f953a573004bf8.png)

Unlike other similar libraries, the Baubles API and mod has been designed explicitly to allow for easy and powerful rendering for your baubles.

For developer, data, and API documentation, check out the [Github Repository](https://github.com/Tanticle/baubles) and the [Wiki](https://github.com/Tanticle/baubles/wiki).
